audit_items.proof_trace: The property asserts a NULL-check on the return value of print_search_entry(), but the function is declared 'static void' and has no return value; the assertion is vacuously inapplicable. Within the function body, ldap_get_dn() can return NULL (getdn.c:102), but ldap_dn2ufn(NULL) is explicitly safe (ldap_dn_normalize handles NULL at getdn.c:371-373), and printf("%s", NULL) is practically safe on all major platforms though technically UB. Additionally, this is a developer test utility (libraries/libldap/test.c), not an externally-exposed production component.
